description: Callback-driven RevenueCat wrapper for React Native in-app purchases with zero app-specific dependencies
rules: All app-specific concerns (alerts, navigation, analytics) are handled via callbacks — never baked into the library
Use onTrackEvent fallback pattern: hook-level callback ?? provider-level callback
Return PlutusError in error callbacks, not translated strings
New hooks: create src/hooks/use-{name}.ts, consume usePlutus(), export from src/index.ts
Every public API must have JSDoc with @example tag
Wrap app root with PlutusProvider for configuration and shared callbacks
